In production mode,\n34\t * critical misconfigurations will cause startup to fail.\n35\t */\n36\texport function validateSecurityConfiguration(): ValidationResult {\n37\t  const result: ValidationResult = {\n38\t    passed: true,\n39\t    warnings: [],\n40\t    errors: [],\n41\t  };\n42\t\n43\t  const isProduction = process.env[\"NODE_ENV\"] === \"production\";\n44\t  const isTest = process.env[\"TEST_MODE\"] === \"true\";\n45\t\n46\t  // Skip validation in test mode\n47\t  if (isTest) {\n48\t    logger.debug(\"Security validation skipped in test mode\");\n49\t    return result;\n50\t  }\n51\t\n52\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n53\t  // ALLOWED_HOSTS validation\n54\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n55\t  const allowedHosts = process.env[\"ALLOWED_HOSTS\"];\n56\t  if (!allowedHosts || allowedHosts.trim() === \"\") {\n57\t    const message =\n58\t      \"ALLOWED_HOSTS is not set. This allows any hostname, which may expose the application to host header injection attacks.\";\n59\t\n60\t    if (isProduction) {\n61\t      result.errors.push(message);\n62\t      result.passed = false;\n63\t    } else {\n64\t      result.warnings.push(message + \" (OK for development)\");\n65\t    }\n66\t  }\n67\t\n68\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n69\t  // PASSWORD_PEPPER validation\n70\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n71\t  const passwordPepper = process.env[\"PASSWORD_PEPPER\"];\n72\t  if (!passwordPepper || passwordPepper.trim() === \"\" || passwordPepper.length < 32) {\n73\t    const message =\n74\t      \"PASSWORD_PEPPER is not set or too short (should be at least 32 bytes / 64 hex chars). This reduces password security by removing a layer of defense.\";\n75\t\n76\t    result.warnings.push(message);\n77\t  }\n78\t\n79\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n80\t  // VAPID keys validation\n81\t  // -------------------------------------------------------------------------\n82\t  const vapidPublicKey = process.env[\"VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY\"];\n83\t  const vapidPrivateKey = process.env[\"VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY\"];\n84\t\n85\t  if (!vapidPublicKey || vapidPublicKey.trim() === \"\") {\n86\t    const message = \"VAPID_PUBLIC_KEY is not set. Push notifications will not work.\";\n87\t    result.warnings.push(message);\n88\t  }\n89\t\n90\t  if (!vapidPrivateKey || vapidPrivateKey.trim() === \"\") {\n91\t    const message = \"VAPID_PRIVATE_KEY is not set. Push notifications will not work.\";\n92\t    result.warnings.push(message);\n93\t  }\n94\t\n95\t  // Log warnings\n96\t  if (result.warnings.length > 0) {\n97\t    logger.warn(\"Security configuration warnings\", {\n98\t      warnings: result.warnings,\n99\t    });\n100\t  }\n101\t\n102\t  // Log errors and fail in production\n103\t  if (result.errors.length > 0) {\n104\t    logger.error(\"Security configuration errors\", undefined, {\n105\t      errors: result.errors,\n106\t      fatal: true,\n107\t    });\n108\t  }\n109\t\n110\t  return result;\n111\t}\n112\t\n113\t/**\n114\t * Validate security configuration and throw if critical issues are found.\n115\t *\n116\t * Use this at startup to fail-fast on security misconfigurations.\n117\t *\n118\t * @throws Error if critical security issues are found in production\n119\t */\n120\texport function validateSecurityOrThrow(): void {\n121\t  const result = validateSecurityConfiguration();\n122\t\n123\t  if (!result.passed) {\n124\t    throw new Error(\n125\t      `Security validation failed:\\n${result.errors.map((e) => `  - ${e}`).join(\"\\n\")}`\n126\t    );\n127\t  }\n128\t}\n129\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_2caec6a1deba48e18ae80329","session_id":"3c2d9ced-ce07-4b7f-aa8c-53a930490c58","uuid":"63821536-97a6-4eb6-aa1c-dbd4cf2b0bf4","timestamp":"2026-07-04T04:27:12.946Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Find TEST_MODE usage"}

when true, rate limiting is disabled */\n23\tlet testMode = false;\n24\t\n25\t/** Enable or disable test mode (useful for E2E tests) */\n26\texport function setRateLimiterTestMode(enabled: boolean): void {\n27\t  testMode = enabled;\n28\t}\n29\t\n30\t/** Get current test mode state */\n31\texport function getRateLimiterTestMode(): boolean {\n32\t  return testMode;\n33\t}\n34\t\n35\t/** Reset rate limiter state (useful for testing) */\n36\texport function resetRateLimiter(): void {\n37\t  buckets.clear();\n38\t}\n39\t\n40\t// Prune stale buckets every 5 minutes\n41\tconst PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS = 300_000;\n42\tlet lastPrune = Date.now();\n43\t\n44\tfunction getClientIp(c: { req: { header(name: string): string | undefined } }): string {\n45\t  // Cloudflare tunnel sets CF-Connecting-IP\n46\t  return (\n47\t    c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n48\t    c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n49\t    \"unknown\"\n50\t  );\n51\t}\n52\t\n53\tfunction refillBucket(bucket: TokenBucket, now: number): void {\n54\t  const elapsed = now - bucket.lastRefill;\n55\t  const tokensToAdd = Math.floor(elapsed / REFILL_INTERVAL_MS);\n56\t  if (tokensToAdd > 0) {\n57\t    bucket.tokens = Math.min(MAX_TOKENS, bucket.tokens + tokensToAdd);\n58\t    bucket.lastRefill = now - (elapsed % REFILL_INTERVAL_MS);\n59\t  }\n60\t}\n61\t\n62\t/**\n63\t * Token bucket rate limiter middleware.\n64\t * Returns 429 with structured error when rate limit is exceeded.\n65\t */\n66\texport function rateLimiter(): MiddlewareHandler {\n67\t  return async (c, next) => {\n68\t    // Skip rate limiting in test mode\n69\t    if (testMode) {\n70\t      await next();\n71\t      return;\n72\t    }\n73\t\n74\t    const now = Date.now();\n75\t    const ip = getClientIp(c);\n76\t\n77\t    // Periodic prune of old buckets to prevent memory leak\n78\t    if (now - lastPrune > PRUNE_INTERVAL_MS) {\n79\t      for (const [key, bucket] of buckets) {\n80\t        if (now - bucket.lastRefill > MAX_TOKENS * REFILL_INTERVAL_MS * 2) {\n81\t          buckets.delete(key);\n82\t        }\n83\t      }\n84\t      lastPrune = now;\n85\t    }\n86\t\n87\t    let bucket = buckets.get(ip);\n88\t    if (!bucket) {\n89\t      bucket = { tokens: MAX_TOKENS, lastRefill: now };\n90\t      buckets.set(ip, bucket);\n91\t    }\n92\t\n93\t    refillBucket(bucket, now);\n94\t\n95\t    // Epoch-second when the next token will be added\n96\t    const resetEpoch = Math.ceil((bucket.lastRefill + REFILL_INTERVAL_MS) / 1000);\n97\t\n98\t    if (bucket.tokens <= 0) {\n99\t      const retryAfter = Math.ceil(REFILL_INTERVAL_MS / 1000);\n100\t      c.header(\"Retry-After\", String(retryAfter));\n101\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", String(MAX_TOKENS));\n102\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", \"0\");\n103\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", String(resetEpoch));\n104\t      return c.json(\n105\t        {\n106\t          error: \"Too many requests\",\n107\t          retryAfter,\n108\t        },\n109\t        429\n110\t      );\n111\t    }\n112\t\n113\t    bucket.tokens -= 1;\n114\t    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", String(MAX_TOKENS));\n115\t    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", String(Math.floor(bucket.tokens)));\n116\t    c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", String(resetEpoch));\n117\t    await next();\n118\t  };\n119\t}\n120\t"}]},"parent_tool_use_id":"call_2caec6a1deba48e18ae80329","session_id":"3c2d9ced-ce07-4b7f-aa8c-53a930490c58","uuid":"bbafcdde-fcc7-4997-9673-f5ae33acda96","timestamp":"2026-07-04T04:27:37.067Z","subagent_type":"Explore","task_description":"Find TEST_MODE usage"}

*/\n17\t\n18\timport type { Context, MiddlewareHandler } from \"hono\";\n19\timport { HTTPException } from \"hono/http-exception\";\n20\timport { logger } from AuthRateLimitTier =\n39\t  | \"permissive\" // 100 requests/minute (e.g., login page)\n40\t  | \"standard\" // 20 requests/minute (e.g., login attempt)\n41\t  | \"strict\" // 5 requests/minute (e.g., number;\n58\t  /** Ban IP after this many violations (0 = no ban) */\n59\t  banThreshold?: number;\n60\t  /** Ban duration in milliseconds */\n61\t  banDurationMs?: number;\n62\t}\n63\t\n64\t/**\n65\t * Rate limit entry for tracking.\n66\t */\n67\tinterface RateLimitEntry {\n68\t  /** Request count */\n69\t  count: number;\n70\t  /** Window start time */\n71\t  windowStart: number;\n72\t  /** currently banned */\n79\t  banned?: boolean;\n80\t  /** Ban expiration time */\n81\t  bannedUntil?: number;\n82\t}\n83\t\n84\t/**\n85\t * Rate limit result.\n86\t */\n87\texport interface RateLimitResult {\n88\t  /** Whether the request is allowed */\n89\t  allowed: boolean;\n90\t  /** Remaining requests in current window */\n91\t  remaining: number;\n92\t  /** Time when limit resets (Unix timestamp) */\n93\t  resetAt: number;\n94\t  /** Whether CAPTCHA should be triggered */\n95\t  triggerCaptcha: boolean;\n96\t  /** Whether IP is banned */\n97\t  banned: boolean;\n98\t  /** Ban ============================================================================\n105\t// Default Rate Limit Configurations\n106\t// ============================================================================\n107\t\n108\t/**\n109\t * Default rate limit configurations for different tiers.\n110\t */\n111\tconst DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS: Record<AuthRateLimitTier, AuthRateLimitConfig> = {\n112\t  permissive: {\n113\t    requests: 100,\n114\t    windowMs: 60 * 1000, // 1 minute\n115\t    skipSuccessfulRequests: true,\n116\t    skipTrustedIps: true,\n117\t    captchaThreshold: 80,\n118\t    banThreshold: 200,\n119\t    banDurationMs: 15 * 60 * 1000, // 15 minutes\n120\t  },\n121\t  standard: {\n122\t    requests: 20,\n123\t    windowMs: 60 * 1000,\n124\t    skipSuccessfulRequests: true,\n125\t    skipTrustedIps: true,\n126\t    captchaThreshold: 15,\n127\t    banThreshold: 50,\n128\t    banDurationMs: 30 * 60 * 1000, // 30 minutes\n129\t  },\n130\t  strict: {\n131\t    requests: 5,\n132\t    windowMs: 60 * 1000,\n133\t    skipSuccessfulRequests: false,\n134\t    skipTrustedIps: false,\n135\t    captchaThreshold: 3,\n136\t    banThreshold: 10,\n137\t    banDurationMs: 60 * 60 * 1000, // 1 hour\n138\t  },\n139\t  aggressive: {\n140\t    requests: 1,\n141\t    windowMs: 60 * 1000,\n142\t    skipSuccessfulRequests: false,\n143\t    skipTrustedIps: false,\n144\t    captchaThreshold: 2,\n145\t    banThreshold: 5,\n146\t    banDurationMs: 24 * 60 * 60 * 1000, // 24 hours\n147\t  },\n148\t};\n149\t\n150\t// ============================================================================\n151\t// In-Memory Storage (Replace with Redis for distributed systems)\n152\t// ============================================================================\n153\t\n154\t/**\n155\t * Rate limit storage by IP address.\n156\t */\n157\tconst rateLimitStore = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n158\t\n159\t/**\n160\t * Rate limit storage by API key ID.\n161\t */\n162\tconst apiKeyRateLimitStore = new Map<string, RateLimitEntry>();\n163\t\n164\t/**\n165\t * Trusted IP addresses that bypass rate limiting.\n166\t * In production, load from configuration or database.\n167\t */\n168\tconst trustedIps = new Set<string>([\n169\t  \"127.0.0.1\",\n170\t  \"::1\",\n171\t  // Add internal/VPN IPs here\n172\t]);\n173\t\n174\t/**\n175\t * Previously banned IPs that have been manually unbanned.\n176\t */\n177\tconst unbannedIps = new Set<string>();\n178\t\n179\t// ============================================================================\n180\t// Rate Limit Checking\n181\t// ============================================================================\n182\t\n183\t/**\n184\t * Check rate limit for a given identifier (IP or API key).\n185\t */\n186\tfunction checkRateLimit(\n187\t  identifier: string,\n188\t  config: AuthRateLimitConfig,\n189\t  now: number\n190\t): RateLimitResult {\n191\t  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(identifier);\n192\t\n193\t  // No entry yet - first request\n194\t  if (!entry) {\n195\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, {\n196\t      count: 1,\n197\t      windowStart: now,\n198\t      windowMs: config.windowMs,\n199\t      violationCount: 0,\n200\t    });\n201\t    return {\n202\t      allowed: true,\n203\t      remaining: config.requests - 1,\n204\t      resetAt: now + config.windowMs,\n205\t      triggerCaptcha: false,\n206\t      banned: false,\n207\t    };\n208\t  }\n209\t\n210\t  // Check if IP is banned\n211\t  if (entry.banned && entry.bannedUntil && entry.bannedUntil > now) {\n212\t    const retryAfter = Math.ceil((entry.bannedUntil - now) / 1000);\n213\t    return {\n214\t      allowed: false,\n215\t      remaining: 0,\n216\t      resetAt: entry.bannedUntil,\n217\t      triggerCaptcha: false,\n218\t      banned: true,\n219\t      bannedUntil: entry.bannedUntil,\n220\t      retryAfter,\n221\t    };\n222\t  }\n223\t\n224\t  // Check if window has expired\n225\t  if (now - entry.windowStart >= entry.windowMs) {\n226\t    // Reset window\n227\t    entry.count = 1;\n228\t    entry.windowStart = now;\n229\t    entry.windowMs = config.windowMs;\n230\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n231\t    return {\n232\t      allowed: true,\n233\t      remaining: config.requests - 1,\n234\t      resetAt: now + config.windowMs,\n235\t      triggerCaptcha: false,\n236\t      banned: false,\n237\t    };\n238\t  }\n239\t\n240\t  // Check if limit exceeded\n241\t  if (entry.count >= config.requests) {\n242\t    entry.violationCount++;\n243\t    entry.lastViolation = now;\n244\t\n245\t    // Check if we should ban the IP\n246\t    if (\n247\t      config.banThreshold &&\n248\t      config.banThreshold > 0 &&\n249\t      entry.violationCount >= config.banThreshold\n250\t    ) {\n251\t      entry.banned = true;\n252\t      entry.bannedUntil = now + (config.banDurationMs || 60 * 60 * 1000);\n253\t      rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n254\t      saveRateLimitBan(identifier, entry.bannedUntil, entry.violationCount);\n255\t\n256\t      logger.warn(\"IP banned due to repeated rate limit violations\", {\n257\t        identifier,\n258\t        violationCount: entry.violationCount,\n259\t        bannedUntil: new Date(entry.bannedUntil).toISOString(),\n260\t      });\n261\t\n262\t      return {\n263\t        allowed: false,\n264\t        remaining: 0,\n265\t        resetAt: entry.windowStart + config.windowMs,\n266\t        triggerCaptcha: false,\n267\t        banned: true,\n268\t        bannedUntil: entry.bannedUntil,\n269\t        retryAfter: Math.ceil((entry.bannedUntil - now) / 1000),\n270\t      };\n271\t    }\n272\t\n273\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n274\t\n275\t    const shouldTriggerCaptcha =\n276\t      config.captchaThreshold !== undefined && entry.violationCount >= config.captchaThreshold;\n277\t\n278\t    return {\n279\t      allowed: false,\n280\t      remaining: 0,\n281\t      resetAt: entry.windowStart + config.windowMs,\n282\t      triggerCaptcha: shouldTriggerCaptcha,\n283\t      banned: false,\n284\t      retryAfter: Math.ceil((entry.windowStart + config.windowMs - now) / 1000),\n285\t    };\n286\t  }\n287\t\n288\t  // Increment counter\n289\t  entry.count++;\n290\t  rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n291\t\n292\t  return {\n293\t    allowed: true,\n294\t    remaining: config.requests - entry.count,\n295\t    resetAt: entry.windowStart + config.windowMs,\n296\t    triggerCaptcha: false,\n297\t    banned: false,\n298\t  };\n299\t}\n300\t\n301\t/**\n302\t * Record a successful request (for skipSuccessfulRequests).\n303\t */\n304\tfunction recordSuccess(identifier: string): void {\n305\t  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(identifier);\n306\t  if (entry && entry.count > 0) {\n307\t    entry.count--;\n308\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n309\t  }\n310\t}\n311\t\n312\t// ============================================================================\n313\t// IP Address Extraction\n314\t// ============================================================================\n315\t\n316\t/**\n317\t * Extract client IP address from request headers.\n318\t */\n319\tfunction extractClientIp(c: Context): string {\n320\t  return (\n321\t    c.req.header(\"CF-Connecting-IP\") ||\n322\t    c.req.header(\"X-Forwarded-For\")?.split(\",\")[0]?.trim() ||\n323\t    c.req.header(\"X-Real-IP\") ||\n324\t    c.req.header(\"Fly-Client-IP\") ||\n325\t    \"unknown\"\n326\t  );\n327\t}\n328\t\n329\t// ============================================================================\n330\t// Middleware Factory\n331\t// ============================================================================\n332\t\n333\t/**\n334\t * Create an authentication rate limit middleware.\n335\t *\n336\t * @param tier - Rate limit tier to use\n337\t * @param options - Additional options\n338\t */\n339\texport function authRateLimit(\n340\t  tier: AuthRateLimitTier = \"standard\",\n341\t  options: {\n342\t    /** Custom configuration (overrides tier defaults) */\n343\t    config?: Partial<AuthRateLimitConfig>;\n344\t    /** Key extractor function (for API key-based limiting) */\n345\t    keyExtractor?: (c: Context) => string | null;\n346\t    /** Whether to add rate limit headers to response */\n347\t    addHeaders?: boolean;\n348\t    /** Custom trusted IPs (in addition to defaults) */\n349\t    trustedIps?: string[];\n350\t  } = {}\n351\t): MiddlewareHandler {\n352\t  const {\n353\t    config: customConfig,\n354\t    keyExtractor,\n355\t    addHeaders = true,\n356\t    trustedIps: customTrustedIps,\n357\t  } = options;\n358\t\n359\t  // Add custom trusted IPs\n360\t  if (customTrustedIps) {\n361\t    for (const ip of customTrustedIps) {\n362\t      trustedIps.add(ip);\n363\t    }\n364\t  }\n365\t\n366\t  // Merge configuration\n367\t  const baseConfig = DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS[tier];\n368\t  const config: AuthRateLimitConfig = { ...baseConfig, ...customConfig };\n369\t\n370\t  return async (c, next) => {\n371\t    const now = Date.now();\n372\t    const clientIp = extractClientIp(c);\n373\t\n374\t    // Check if IP is trusted and should be skipped\n375\t    if (config.skipTrustedIps && trustedIps.has(clientIp)) {\n376\t      if (addHeaders) {\n377\t        c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", config.requests.toString());\n378\t        c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", config.requests.toString());\n379\t        c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", (now + config.windowMs).toString());\n380\t      }\n381\t      return next();\n382\t    }\n383\t\n384\t    // Check if IP was manually unbanned\n385\t    if (unbannedIps.has(clientIp)) {\n386\t      const entry = rateLimitStore.get(clientIp);\n387\t      if (entry) {\n388\t        delete entry.banned;\n389\t        delete entry.bannedUntil;\n390\t        entry.violationCount = 0;\n391\t        rateLimitStore.set(clientIp, entry);\n392\t      }\n393\t      unbannedIps.delete(clientIp);\n394\t    }\n395\t\n396\t    // Check rate limit for IP\n397\t    const ipResult = checkRateLimit(clientIp, config, now);\n398\t\n399\t    // Check rate limit for API key if extractor provided\n400\t    let keyResult: RateLimitResult | null = null;\n401\t    if (keyExtractor) {\n402\t      const keyId = keyExtractor(c);\n403\t      if (keyId) {\n404\t        keyResult = checkRateLimit(`key:${keyId}`, config, now);\n405\t      }\n406\t    }\n407\t\n408\t    // Use the most restrictive result\n409\t    const result: RateLimitResult =\n410\t      !keyResult || ipResult.allowed === keyResult.allowed\n411\t        ? ipResult\n412\t        : keyResult.allowed\n413\t          ? ipResult\n414\t          : keyResult;\n415\t\n416\t    // Handle banned IP\n417\t    if (result.banned) {\n418\t      securityLogger.logSuspiciousActivity(\n419\t        c,\n420\t        \"banned_ip_auth_attempt\",\n421\t        \"Request from banned IP address\"\n422\t      );\n423\t      throw new HTTPException(429, {\n424\t        message: \"Too many requests. IP temporarily banned due to repeated violations.\",\n425\t      });\n426\t    }\n427\t\n428\t    // Handle rate limit exceeded\n429\t    if (!result.allowed) {\n430\t      securityLogger.logRateLimitExceeded(c, config.requests, config.windowMs);\n431\t\n432\t      if (result.triggerCaptcha) {\n433\t        // Set a flag indicating CAPTCHA should be shown\n434\t        c.set(\"requireCaptcha\", true);\n435\t      }\n436\t\n437\t      throw new HTTPException(429, {\n438\t        message: result.triggerCaptcha\n439\t          ? \"Too many attempts. Please complete the CAPTCHA to continue.\"\n440\t          : \"Too many requests. Please try again later.\",\n441\t      });\n442\t    }\n443\t\n444\t    // Add rate limit headers\n445\t    if (addHeaders) {\n446\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Limit\", config.requests.toString());\n447\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\", result.remaining.toString());\n448\t      c.header(\"X-RateLimit-Reset\", result.resetAt.toString());\n449\t    }\n450\t\n451\t    // Track if this was a CAPTCHA-protected request\n452\t    if (result.triggerCaptcha) {\n453\t      c.set(\"captchaRequired\", true);\n454\t    }\n455\t\n456\t    // Process request\n457\t    await next();\n458\t\n459\t    // Skip successful requests from counting if configured\n460\t    const status = c.res.status;\n461\t    if (config.skipSuccessfulRequests && status >= 200 && status < 300) {\n462\t      recordSuccess(clientIp);\n463\t      if (keyExtractor) {\n464\t        const keyId = keyExtractor(c);\n465\t        if (keyId) {\n466\t          recordSuccess(`key:${keyId}`);\n467\t        }\n468\t      }\n469\t    }\n470\t  };\n471\t}\n472\t\n473\t// ============================================================================\n474\t// Management Functions\n475\t// ============================================================================\n476\t\n477\t/**\n478\t * Reset rate limit for a specific IP or key.\n479\t */\n480\texport function resetRateLimit(identifier: string): void {\n481\t  rateLimitStore.delete(identifier);\n482\t  logger.info(\"Rate limit reset\", { identifier });\n483\t}\n484\t\n485\t/**\n486\t * Get rate limit status for an identifier.\n487\t */\n488\texport function getRateLimitStatus(identifier: string): RateLimitEntry | undefined {\n489\t  return rateLimitStore.get(identifier);\n490\t}\n491\t\n492\t/**\n493\t * Manually ban an IP address.\n494\t */\n495\texport function banIp(ip: string, durationMs: number = 60 * 60 * 1000, reason?: string): void {\n496\t  const existing = rateLimitStore.get(ip);\n497\t  const entry: RateLimitEntry = existing ?? {\n498\t    count: 0,\n499\t    windowStart: Date.now(),\n500\t    windowMs: DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS.standard.windowMs,\n501\t    violationCount: 0,\n502\t  };\n503\t  entry.banned = true;\n504\t  entry.bannedUntil = Date.now() + durationMs;\n505\t  rateLimitStore.set(ip, entry);\n506\t  saveRateLimitBan(ip, entry.bannedUntil, entry.violationCount);\n507\t\n508\t  logger.warn(\"IP manually banned\", { ip, durationMs, reason });\n509\t}\n510\t\n511\t/**\n512\t * Unban an IP address.\n513\t */\n514\texport function unbanIp(ip: string): void {\n515\t  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(ip);\n516\t  if (entry) {\n517\t    delete entry.banned;\n518\t    delete entry.bannedUntil;\n519\t    entry.violationCount = 0;\n520\t    rateLimitStore.set(ip, entry);\n521\t  }\n522\t  unbannedIps.add(ip);\n523\t  deleteRateLimitBan(ip);\n524\t  logger.info(\"IP unbanned\", { ip });\n525\t}\n526\t\n527\t/**\n528\t * Add a trusted IP address.\n529\t */\n530\texport function addTrustedIp(ip: string): void {\n531\t  trustedIps.add(ip);\n532\t  saveTrustedIp(ip);\n533\t  logger.info(\"Trusted IP added\", { ip });\n534\t}\n535\t\n536\t/**\n537\t * Remove a trusted IP address.\n538\t */\n539\texport function removeTrustedIp(ip: string): void {\n540\t  trustedIps.delete(ip);\n541\t  deleteTrustedIp(ip);\n542\t  logger.info(\"Trusted IP removed\", { ip });\n543\t}\n544\t\n545\t/**\n546\t * Hydrate in-memory rate limit bans and trusted IPs from the database.\n547\t * Call once on startup after setSecurityDb().\n548\t */\n549\texport function loadRateLimitDataFromDb(): void {\n550\t  const bans = loadRateLimitBans();\n551\t  for (const [identifier, ban] of bans) {\n552\t    const entry: RateLimitEntry = rateLimitStore.get(identifier) ?? {\n553\t      count: 0,\n554\t      windowStart: Date.now(),\n555\t      windowMs: 60 * 60 * 1000,\n556\t      violationCount: ban.violationCount,\n557\t    };\n558\t    entry.banned = true;\n559\t    entry.bannedUntil = ban.bannedUntil;\n560\t    entry.violationCount = ban.violationCount;\n561\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\n562\t  }\n563\t\n564\t  const ips = loadTrustedIps();\n565\t  for (const ip of ips) {\n566\t    trustedIps.add(ip);\n567\t  }\n568\t\n569\t  logger.info(\"Rate limit data loaded from DB\", { bans: bans.size, trustedIps: ips.size });\n570\t}\n571\t\n572\t/**\n573\t * Clean up expired rate limit entries.\n574\t */\n575\texport function cleanupRateLimits(): number {\n576\t  const now = Date.now();\n577\t  let cleaned = 0;\n578\t\n579\t  for (const [identifier, entry] of rateLimitStore.entries()) {\n580\t    // Remove entries whose window has expired and are not banned\n581\t    if (!entry.banned && now - entry.windowStart >= entry.windowMs) {\n582\t      rateLimitStore.delete(identifier);\n583\t      cleaned++;\n584\t    }\n585\t  }\n586\t\n587\t  if (cleaned > 0) {\n588\t    logger.debug(\"Cleaned up expired rate limit entries\", { count: cleaned });\n589\t  }\n590\t\n591\t  return cleaned;\n592\t}\n593\t\n594\t/**\n595\t * Clear all rate limit entries.\n596\t * Intended for testing purposes only.\n597\t */\n598\texport function _clearAllRateLimits(): void {\n599\t  rateLimitStore.clear();\n600\t  apiKeyRateLimitStore.clear();\n601\t}\n602\t\n603\t// Start automatic cleanup interval (every 5 minutes)\n604\tsetInterval(cleanupRateLimits, 5 * 60 * 1000);\n605\t\n606\t/**\n607\t * Get statistics about current rate limits.\n608\t */\n609\texport function getRateLimitStats(): {\n610\t  totalEntries: number;\n611\t  bannedIps: number;\n612\t  trustedIps: number;\n613\t  entriesByViolationCount: Record<string, number>;\n614\t} {\n615\t  const entries = Array.from(rateLimitStore.values());\n616\t  const bannedCount = entries.filter((e) =>   remaining: config.requests - 1,\\n234\\t      resetAt: now + config.windowMs,\\n235\\t      triggerCaptcha: false,\\n236\\t      banned: false,\\n237\\t    };\\n238\\t  }\\n239\\t\\n240\\t  // Check remaining: 0,\\n265\\t        resetAt: entry.windowStart + config.windowMs,\\n266\\t        triggerCaptcha: false,\\n267\\t        banned: true,\\n268\\t        bannedUntil:    const shouldTriggerCaptcha =\\n276\\t      config.captchaThreshold !== undefined && entry.violationCount >= config.captchaThreshold;\\n277\\t\\n278\\t    return {\\n279\\t      allowed: rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\\n291\\t\\n292\\t  return {\\n293\\t    allowed: true,\\n294\\t    remaining: config.requests - entry.count,\\n295\\t    resetAt: entry.windowStart + */\\n304\\tfunction recordSuccess(identifier: string): void {\\n305\\t  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(identifier);\\n306\\t  if (entry && entry.count > 0) {\\n307\\t    entry.count--;\\n308\\t    rateLimitStore.set(identifier, entry);\\n309\\t  }\\n310\\t}\\n311\\t\\n312\\t// ============================================================================\\n313\\t// IP Address Extraction\\n314\\t// ============================================================================\\n315\\t\\n316\\t/**\\n317\\t * Extract client IP address from request headers.\\n318\\t */\\n319\\tfunction extractClientIp(c: Context): string {\\n320\\t  return (\\n321\\t    c.req.header(\\\"CF-Connecting-IP\\\") ||\\n322\\t    c.req.header(\\\"X-Forwarded-For\\\")?.split(\\\",\\\")[0]?.trim() ||\\n323\\t    c.req.header(\\\"X-Real-IP\\\") ||\\n324\\t    c.req.header(\\\"Fly-Client-IP\\\") ||\\n325\\t    \\\"unknown\\\"\\n326\\t  );\\n327\\t}\\n328\\t\\n329\\t// ============================================================================\\n330\\t// Middleware Factory\\n331\\t// ============================================================================\\n332\\t\\n333\\t/**\\n334\\t * Create an authentication rate limit middleware.\\n335\\t *\\n336\\t * @param tier - Rate limit tier to use\\n337\\t * @param options - Additional options\\n338\\t */\\n339\\texport function authRateLimit(\\n340\\t  tier: AuthRateLimitTier = \\\"standard\\\",\\n341\\t  options: {\\n342\\t    /** Custom configuration (overrides tier defaults) */\\n343\\t    config?: Partial<AuthRateLimitConfig>;\\n344\\t    /** Key extractor function (for API key-based limiting) */\\n345\\t {\\n362\\t      trustedIps.add(ip);\\n363\\t    }\\n364\\t  }\\n365\\t\\n366\\t  // Merge configuration\\n367\\t  const baseConfig = DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS[tier];\\n368\\t  const config: AuthRateLimitConfig = { ...baseConfig, ...customConfig };\\n369\\t\\n370\\t  return async (c, next) => {\\n371\\t    const now = Date.now();\\n372\\t    const clientIp = extractClientIp(c);\\n373\\t\\n374\\t    // Check if IP is trusted and should be skipped\\n375\\t    if (config.skipTrustedIps && trustedIps.has(clientIp)) {\\n376\\t      if (addHeaders) {\\n377\\t        c.header(\\\"X-RateLimit-Limit\\\", config.requests.toString());\\n378\\t        c.header(\\\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\\\", config.requests.toString());\\n379\\t        c.header(\\\"X-RateLimit-Reset\\\", (now + config.windowMs).toString());\\n380\\t      }\\n381\\t      return next();\\n382\\t    }\\n383\\t\\n384\\t    // Check if IP was manually unbanned\\n385\\t entry.bannedUntil;\\n390\\t        entry.violationCount = 0;\\n391\\t        rateLimitStore.set(clientIp, entry);\\n392\\t      }\\n393\\t      unbannedIps.delete(clientIp);\\n394\\t    }\\n395\\t\\n396\\t    // Check rate limit for IP\\n397\\t    const ipResult = checkRateLimit(clientIp, config, now);\\n398\\t\\n399\\t    // Check rate limit for API key if extractor provided\\n400\\t    let keyResult: RateLimitResult | null = null;\\n401\\t    if (keyExtractor) {\\n402\\t      const keyId = keyExtractor(c);\\n403\\t      if (keyId) {\\n404\\t        keyResult = || ipResult.allowed === keyResult.allowed\\n411\\t        ? ipResult\\n412\\t        : keyResult.allowed\\n413\\t          ? ipResult\\n414\\t          : keyResult;\\n415\\t\\n416\\t    // Handle config.requests.toString());\\n447\\t      c.header(\\\"X-RateLimit-Remaining\\\", result.remaining.toString());\\n448\\t      c.header(\\\"X-RateLimit-Reset\\\", result.resetAt.toString());\\n449\\t    }\\n450\\t\\n451\\t    // Track if this was a CAPTCHA-protected request\\n452\\t    if (result.triggerCaptcha) {\\n453\\t      c.set(\\\"captchaRequired\\\", true);\\n454\\t    }\\n455\\t\\n456\\t (config.skipSuccessfulRequests && status >= 200 && status < 300) {\\n462\\t      recordSuccess(clientIp);\\n463\\t      if (keyExtractor) {\\n464\\t        const keyId = keyExtractor(c);\\n465\\t        if (keyId) {\\n466\\t          recordSuccess(`key:${keyId}`);\\n467\\t        }\\n468\\t      }\\n469\\t    }\\n470\\t  };\\n471\\t}\\n472\\t\\n473\\t// rate limit status for an identifier.\\n487\\t */\\n488\\texport function getRateLimitStatus(identifier: string): RateLimitEntry | undefined {\\n489\\t  return rateLimitStore.get(identifier);\\n490\\t}\\n491\\t\\n492\\t/**\\n493\\t * Manually ban an IP address.\\n494\\t */\\n495\\texport function banIp(ip: string, durationMs: number = 60 * 60 * 1000, windowMs: DEFAULT_RATE_LIMITS.standard.windowMs,\\n501\\t    violationCount: 0,\\n502\\t  };\\n503\\t  entry.banned = true;\\n504\\t  entry.bannedUntil = Date.now() + durationMs;\\n505\\t  rateLimitStore.set(ip, entry);\\n506\\t  saveRateLimitBan(ip, entry.bannedUntil, entry.violationCount);\\n507\\t\\n508\\t  logger.warn(\\\"IP manually banned\\\", { ip, durationMs, reason });\\n509\\t}\\n510\\t\\n511\\t/**\\n512\\t * Unban an IP address.\\n513\\t */\\n514\\texport function unbanIp(ip: string): void {\\n515\\t  const entry = rateLimitStore.get(ip);\\n516\\t  if (entry) */\\n530\\texport function addTrustedIp(ip: string): void {\\n531\\t  trustedIps.add(ip);\\n532\\t  saveTrustedIp(ip);\\n533\\t  logger.info(\\\"Trusted IP added\\\", { ip deleteTrustedIp(ip);\\n542\\t  logger.info(\\\"Trusted IP removed\\\", { ip });\\n543\\t}\\n544\\t\\n545\\t/**\\n546\\t * Hydrate in-memory rate limit bans and trusted IPs from the database.\\n547\\t * Call once on startup after setSecurityDb().\\n548\\t */\\n549\\texport function loadRateLimitDataFromDb(): void {\\n550\\t  const bans = loadRateLimitBans();\\n551\\t  for (const [identifier, ban] of bans) {\\n552\\t    const entry: RateLimitEntry = rateLimitStore.get(identifier) ?? {\\n553\\t      count: 0,\\n554\\t      windowStart: Date.now(),\\n555\\t      windowMs: 60 * 60 * 1000,\\n556\\t      violationCount: ban.violationCount,\\n557\\t    };\\n558\\t    entry.banned = true;\\n559\\t    entry.bannedUntil = ban.bannedUntil;\\n560\\t    entry.violationCount =
